# Remove sequence, starting tree (slide 101). Order m=3.
#
#                       [50]                       a (root)
#                     /      \
#                 [30]        [60,70]              b   c
#                /    \      /   |    \
#            [10]   [40] [55,58] [65] [75,80]      d  e  f  g  h
root 1
1  1  2  50 3
2  1  4  30 5
3  2  6  60 7  70 8
4  1  0  10 0
5  1  0  40 0
6  2  0  55 0  58 0
7  1  0  65 0
8  2  0  75 0  80 0
